title: Guidance audit hardening
summary: Forge Method now routes runtime audit and human-guidance quality concerns through runtime-builder, diagnoses stale plugin installs with repair commands, and tightens install/smoke script validation.
highlights: Guidance Engine recognizes method/runtime audit requests, dead-code concerns, misleading agent docs, and human-guided experience questions as runtime-builder work.
A transcript fixture now locks the runtime audit routing behavior.
Doctor output now includes repair commands when the local plugin installation is stale or broken.
Install and smoke scripts were audited with Ruff, Vulture, Radon, ShellCheck, and PSScriptAnalyzer.
Shell and PowerShell smoke scripts received small lint fixes without changing their product surface.
The internal audit artifact records current parity limits, complexity hotspots, market hook/tracing references, and isolated experiment plans.
